## The vibe check
- [ ] I ran it and it did not burst into flames
- [ ] I didn't commit any secrets, tokens, or my browser history
- [ ] If I touched a page, I clicked around to confirm it still works
- [ ] The code is at least as tidy as I found it (no take-backsies)
